selectionPolicy: Use rendered local cache for visual study; keep only metadata and critique in git.

slides.whyItMatters: Combines a dense analytical chart, narrative body copy, and a strong highlighted takeaway without losing reading order.
slides.engineImplication: Data-heavy slides need one primary visual, labeled outliers, source context, and a separate takeaway block.

slides.whyItMatters: Uses a principle heading and evidence chart to support a specific strategic claim.
slides.engineImplication: Generated slides should separate claim, explanation, evidence, and source instead of filling generic grids.

slides.whyItMatters: Shows how a section slide can be visually memorable while staying typographically restrained.
slides.engineImplication: Section breaks should have a deliberate visual system, not just a numbered divider.

slides.whyItMatters: Balances a large headline with a left-side annotated taxonomy and a subtle background system.
slides.engineImplication: Framework slides need strong spatial hierarchy and labeled relationships, not equal-weight cards.
